title: Sinam
desc: A cop faces problems after his senior officer falsely accuses his wife of an affair, Pari investigates to discover the truth.

title: Main Hoon Wanted
desc: High-octane sports action captures thrilling Pro Kabaddi moments, rivalries, and dramatic victories, showcasing players' skill, strategy, and relentless determination.

title: Srinivasa Kalyanam
desc: Srinivasa Kalyanam illustrates the sacred bond with another human through nuptial rituals and the sanctity of the institution of marriage.

title: Kabir Singh
desc: Brilliant surgeon Kabir and student Preeti face family opposition when their secret romance is discovered. Marriage looms.

title: The Mummy
desc: Adventurer Rick O'Connell and Egyptologist Evelyn, along with a bunch of archaeologists, inadvertently wake up a bedeviled mummy during an archaeological excavation at the ancient city of Hamunaptra.

title: Bagheera
desc: The story centers on a psycho killer with a deep seated aversion towards women due to past traumatic experiences.

title: Connect
desc: In a curfew-bound country, Susan sees her daughter acting strangely. She turns to a pastor online, who suggests an exorcism to help. A gripping tale of mystery and faith!

title: Fast Charlie
desc: A seasoned fixer and hitman, Charlie Swift survives a mob war triggered by a rival boss, then vows revenge to honor his fallen ally, Stan.
